title: SCr-114
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Rhere|Skar|[[Bentilais san Sk'ar|Sk'ar]], the Kaleesh General}} {{Droid |type= |image=[[File:SCr-114.jpg]] |name=SCr-114
"Skar" |homeworld= |birth= |death= |creator= |manufacturer= |line= |model=[[Maintenance droid/Legends|Maintenance droid]] model |class=[[Assassin droid/Legends|Assassin droid]] (originally maintenance droid) |cost= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Masculine programming]] |pronouns= |sensor=Human and infrared range |plating= |armament=*Various built-in weapons *Blaster rifle *2 heavy blaster pistols *Grenade launcher |equipment=*Human range sensor recorder *Infrared sensor recorder *High-sensitivity audio receptors *Fire extinguisher *Comlink *Electronic lockpick |affiliation=Neutral }} {{Quote|Droids are proven to be 27.1 times more efficient.|SCr-114|<{{JournalCite|5|Smugglers of the Outer Rim}}}} '''SCr-114''' or '''"Skar"''' was originally a [[Maintenance droid/Legends|maintenance droid]] aboard the pleasure cruiser ''[[Malka'an Eternal]]'', who turned into an [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]]. ==Biography== ===Rebirth on Edonaaris=== When the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] entered an uncharted [[asteroid field]], the biological crew was forced into abandoning it, leaving behind all the [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. The ship eventually crashed on the muddy [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Edonaaris]], most of the droids perishing in the crash. SCr-114 was one of the few "survivors". His [[Power core/Legends|power core]] was damaged and his [[inhibitor routine]] was destroyed when a power conduit shocked his outer shell. As a consequence, he lost the ability to tell right from wrong as well as all subroutines that would otherwise stop him from making decisions. Moreover, the only motivation active in his system was survival. When a ship of [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Scavenger/Legends|scavengers]] landed near the crash site, his survival instinct told him to get off the planet, and so he killed the Humans and made off with their ship, after having repaired and reprogrammed many of his fellow droids that perished in the crash. ===Skar's talents=== SCr-114 registered the ship as the ''[[Efficient]]'' and changed his own registration code to "Skar" and took up a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]], and [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] career, modifying himself with several hidden weapons. His appearance as a harmless maintenance droid proved to be an advantage as it allowed him to sneak in on victims and evade pursuers. Skar disliked organics, but knew better than to go on violent rampages, since they would surely somehow result in his deactivation by an organic. Therefore he only killed for [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]] or in self-defense. ===Ruthless efficiency=== He did not carry a preferred trademark weapon, but constantly let his personal armory be modified in the repair facilities of the ''Efficient''. Over the [[Standard year/Legends|years]], Skar grew ever more ruthless and cunning, as his [[Droid brain/Legends|droid brain]] allowed for quick decision making without too many ethical interferences. ==Sources== *{{JournalCite|5|Smugglers of the Outer Rim}} {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Assassin droids]] [[Category:Bounty hunters]] [[Category:Droids with masculine programming]] [[Category:Maintenance droids]] [[Category:Mercenaries]] [[Category:Smugglers]]
